description: Pull the NVIDIA VDA demo videos from Hugging Face and flatten them into a single demo input directory for the default demo path.
rules: only the VDA demo dataset (nvidia/video-data-augmentation-demo) is allowed unless ALLOW_NON_VDA_DEMO_DATASET=1 is set explicitly
clears previously flattened *.mp4 in DEMO_DIR; keeps other files intact; writes raw clips to <DEMO_DIR>_raw and flat copies to DEMO_DIR
rejects duplicate basenames across dataset subdirs — scope with HF_DEMO_DATASET_SUBDIR
never substitutes arbitrary web clips or placeholders for missing input
prepared-clip listing + upload hint land under record_store
usage: Set DEMO_DIR (target dir for flattened demo videos, e.g. /srv/sdg/data/vda_inputs). Optional env: HF_TOKEN (gated access), HF_DEMO_DATASET_REVISION, HF_DEMO_DATASET_SUBDIR. Output: prepared.txt.
limitation: Needs network egress to huggingface.co plus curl and python3; gated weights require HF_TOKEN. Offline the porter degrades gracefully and records the failure. Pull/flatten only — does not upload to OSMO or run any augmentation.
